title: Fix --no-auto-commits in aider_wrapper.py FORBIDDEN_AIDER_FLAGS
description: Remove --no-auto-commits from FORBIDDEN_AIDER_FLAGS; it is a safety flag, not a danger flag. Only --auto-commits should be blocked. Identified in TASK-049 review.
objective: Remove --no-auto-commits from FORBIDDEN_AIDER_FLAGS in aider_wrapper.py; it is a safety flag (prevents auto-commit), not a danger flag. Only --auto-commits should be blocked.
forbidden_changes: Do not modify TASK-048 or TASK-049 acceptance criteria
Do not add new flags to FORBIDDEN_AIDER_FLAGS without a blocking reason
Do not change the local_runner API
